brand.name: Kogni
brand.positioning: Kogni is an intelligent learning platform that diagnoses knowledge gaps, builds a skills map, and helps create a data-driven learning plan.

landing.heroTitle: Kogni shows what you truly don't understand yet.
landing.heroSubtitle: Take an AI diagnosis, discover your knowledge gaps, and get a learning plan matched to your level — for math, languages, programming, and many other subjects.
landing.pillar1Desc: A short adaptive test reveals what you actually know and where the gaps are — before you spend time and money on learning.
landing.pillar2Desc: Diagnosis results turn into a clear map of your skills — with strengths and areas to improve.
landing.pillar3Desc: You get concrete recommendations for next steps, matched to your level and goals.
landing.promiseBody: After the diagnosis you receive a measurable knowledge map and a recommended next path — no subjective opinions.
landing.safetyNote: The diagnosis helps identify areas for learning. It does not replace a formal teacher assessment.
landing.headline2: Diagnosis, map, plan — in one place.
landing.howHeadline: Five steps from first sign-in to a measurable learning plan.
landing.step1: Create an account and pick your role
landing.step5: Learn deliberately — with a data-driven plan
landing.footerCtaTitle: See where you really are — in 15 minutes.
landing.footerCtaBody: Free AI diagnosis for any subject — from primary school to university. Math, languages, sciences, humanities, programming. No commitments.

auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.checkEmail: Check your inbox and confirm your email.

onboarding.subtitle: Tell us how you want to use the platform. You can always change this in settings.
onboarding.tutorBlocked: Tutor accounts require verification. Please contact the Kogni team.
onboarding.tutorPendingNote: Tutor accounts require verification by the Kogni team.
onboarding.orgCreated: Organization created. You can now invite students and teachers.
onboarding.parentWelcome: Welcome! Add a child profile to get started.

roles.studentDesc: I'm learning, using diagnosis and the knowledge map.
roles.tutorDesc: 1:1 lessons with the AI Co-pilot (after verification).
roles.companyDesc: Courses for employees and B2B clients.

org.intro: This information helps students and employees recognize your organization. You can change it later.
org.name: Name *
org.descriptionHint: Who you teach, what you teach, contact…

diagnose.title: AI Diagnosis
diagnose.subtitle: Adaptive 12-question test. AI tunes difficulty and topic on the fly. Works for any subject and level — from primary school to university.
diagnose.domainPlaceholder: e.g. Math, English, Python programming, Organic chemistry…
diagnose.intakeNote: The diagnosis takes ~10–15 minutes. AI generates questions in real time, adapting difficulty to your answers.
diagnose.noStrengths: No clear strengths yet — a great starting point for learning.
diagnose.safetyNote: The diagnosis helps identify areas for learning. It does not replace a formal teacher assessment.

discover.title: Find your tutor
discover.subtitle: Browse verified tutors matched to your learning goals.
discover.noTutors: No published tutor profiles yet. Publish yours and start earning.

circles.title: Learning Circles
circles.subtitle: Small groups of 3-6 people learning together.
circles.emptyDesc: Create the first one and invite friends to learn together.

peer.title: Peer Help
peer.subtitle: Quick help from other students. Help others — earn Karma.
peer.empty: No open requests. Be the first to ask!

brain.title: Second Brain
brain.subtitle: All your learning in one place — searchable in natural language.
brain.noTranscripts: Your transcripts will show up here after your first session.

settings.title: Settings
settings.paymentHint: Students will see this after booking a session, so they can pay you directly.
settings.becomeTutorPrompt: Want to help others and earn?
settings.tutorHiddenHint: Fill in the headline and description, then enable the "Published in search" toggle below so students can find you.
settings.headline: Headline
settings.headlinePlaceholder: e.g. Math tutor, 7 years of exam prep experience
settings.becameTutor: You're now a tutor! Complete your profile.

dashboard.studentSubtitle: Learn deliberately. Your knowledge map and recommendations help you choose the next step.
dashboard.parentSubtitle: Manage your children's profiles and track their progress.
dashboard.tutorSubtitle: Focus on teaching — Kogni handles reports and progress analysis.
dashboard.adminSubtitle: Verifications, payment disputes, AI quality, platform audit.

student.avgMasteryHint: Will appear after the first diagnosis
student.nextStepBody: Take the adaptive AI diagnosis for any subject — from primary school to university. AI generates questions on the fly and shows your skills map with concrete learning recommendations.
student.mapAfterDiag: Your knowledge map will be built after the first diagnosis.
student.noLessonsDesc: After the diagnosis you'll see recommended tutors.
student.noTasksDesc: Personalized exercises will appear after your first lesson.

parent.infoBody: Each week of learning Kogni will generate a short report based on lesson, diagnosis and homework data. No subjective opinions.
parent.safetyBody: Accounts for children under 16 require parent or legal guardian consent. Data is stored in the EU.
parent.noChildrenDesc: Add a child profile to start the diagnosis and receive progress reports.
parent.footerNote: Privacy policy · Parent/guardian consent · Legal documents require review before public launch.

child.noDiagnosis: No diagnosis yet — run the first test to build a knowledge map.

addChild.title: Add a child profile
addChild.desc: You'll create a student profile linked to your parent account.
addChild.name: Child's first name *
addChild.subject: Main subject
addChild.consent: I confirm that I am the parent or legal guardian of this child and consent to creating the student profile and processing data for learning, educational diagnosis and generating progress reports.
addChild.consentVersion: Consent version: v1. Legal documents require review before public launch.

knowledge.title: Knowledge map
knowledge.subtitle: After the AI diagnosis you'll see your child's skills map with concrete recommendations.
knowledge.promptBody: Pick a subject and a level — AI will generate questions on the fly, adapt difficulty to the child's answers and return a detailed skills map and recommendations.
knowledge.doneBody: Score: {{score}}% ({{correct}}/{{total}}). The map below is based on diagnosis v1.
knowledge.footerNote: The knowledge map will evolve with each product stage.
knowledge.goalTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Improve percentages and equations before the test.
knowledge.noGoalsDesc: Add the first goal to focus the child's learning.

tutorDash.pendingBody: After verification by the Kogni team your profile can be published in the search.
tutorDash.studentInsightBody: After the first lessons AI suggestions will appear here: what to focus on with each student based on their knowledge map.
tutorDash.noLessonsDesc: Set your availability so students can book.
tutorDash.noNotesDesc: After each lesson you'll fill out a short form — AI will draft an initial report.

admin.ontologyNote: A full ontology editor and item bank will arrive in upcoming iterations. For now data is seeded via migrations.
admin.verifNoneDesc: Tutors awaiting manual verification will appear here.
admin.dispNoneDesc: Once auto-dispute (D+7) is enabled, unconfirmed payments will appear here.
admin.flagNoneDesc: The system filters content that needs review (e.g. banned topics).
admin.auditNoneDesc: Sensitive actions (role changes, verifications, report edits) will be logged here.

org.schoolSubtitle: Manage students, teachers and classes in your school.
org.companySubtitle: Manage teams, trainers and learners in your company.
org.notFound: No organization linked to your account. Create one in onboarding.
org.inviteCreated: Invitation created. Copy and send the link to the invited person.
org.cannotRemoveOwner: You can't remove the organization owner.
org.inviteIntro: After creating, you'll get a unique invitation link to send. The invitation expires after 14 days.
org.noMembers: No members. Send the first invitation above.
org.invitesDesc: Copy the link and send it to the invited person.
org.name: Name
org.inviteBodyGeneric: You've been invited to an organization on Kogni.
org.inviteBodyClick: Click below to accept the invitation.
org.sameEmailNote: The invitation must be accepted from an account created with the same email address.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
